site.author: Rafid Rahman
site.name: Rafid Rahman
site.title: Flutter Developer
site.description: Performance-driven Flutter Developer with 1+ years of experience building scalable mobile applications using Riverpod, RESTful APIs, offline-first caching, and hardware integrations.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Cross-platform mobile development with production-ready, offline-first architectures.
achievements: Architected a scalable offline-first codebase using Riverpod and sqflite local caching with a reusable REST API service layer featuring automated token management and secure session tracking
Engineered an enterprise Asset Management System integrating QR and UHF RFID scanning with queued synchronization workflows for seamless offline inspection tracking
Standardized company-wide mobile UX design systems with a unified library of responsive widgets, TTS pipelines, and high-contrast UI layouts for legacy and localized applications

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Web and mobile solutions across Flutter and React applications.
achievements: Refactored and shipped the production-grade Rinzin Beauty Flutter application, migrating a legacy booking template into a live salon and retail platform with multi-gateway payments and push notifications
Engineered custom business logic using MobX stores for dynamic computed pricing, state persistence, and secure REST API authentication pipelines
Developed reusable UI component libraries and a modular service layer for the Beauty Line Bangladesh React application with custom hooks for optimized data fetching and pagination

experience.title: Junior Developer
achievements: Collaborated on database query optimization to reduce latency and ensured system stability during peak traffic periods
Refined backend logic and UI components for the UGC Equivalence portal to improve user retention and accessibility

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Translating complex designs into high-performance, production-ready mobile applications
summaryParagraphs: Performance-driven Flutter Developer with 1+ years of experience specializing in cross-platform mobile development and production-ready architectures. Proven track record of building scalable mobile applications using Riverpod, RESTful APIs, offline-first caching, and hardware integrations.

Expert at translating complex designs into high-performance code while maintaining clean architecture and strict version control. Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from BRAC University, currently building enterprise mobile solutions at Catch Bangladesh Ltd.

education.heading: Education
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.coursework: Relevant Coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Database Systems, Web Development, Software Engineering

contact.connectBody: I'm always excited to discuss Flutter development, offline-first mobile architecture, and professional collaborations. Feel free to reach out!

keyProjects.title: Gram Adalat
keyProjects.description: Legacy educational mobile application democratizing legal literacy regarding the Bangladesh Village Court Act for rural communities
features: Maintained and optimized a production Play Store application for legal literacy
Text-to-Speech pipelines for visually impaired or illiterate users
High-contrast UI layouts optimized for color-blind readability

keyProjects.title: Personal Life Analytics
keyProjects.description: Modular Flutter data hub integrating Health Connect, Cashew CSV, location exports, gaming logs, and Google Calendar
features: Unified monthly summaries from multiple personal data sources
Feature-based Riverpod architecture for rapid new source onboarding
AI analysis pipeline with OpenAI/Gemini support, structured insight parsing, and local caching

keyProjects.title: Deadshot
keyProjects.description: Real-time squad coordination and group chat app for a Valorant friend group with daily 5-stack signup flow
features: Shared chatroom with message bubbles, reactions, yes/no polls, and unread badges
Flutter Riverpod providers with Firestore transactions and presence tracking
Firebase Auth, FCM push notifications via Cloud Functions, and cross-platform local notifications

keyProjects.title: Asset Management System
keyProjects.description: Field-ready Flutter app for on-site asset tracking with QR and UHF RFID scanning and checklist-driven inspections
features: Offline-first data layer with sqflite caching and queued checklist submissions
QR and UHF RFID scanning with photo capture and REST API sync
Scalable Riverpod architecture with EN/BN localization and volunteer/admin roles

keyProjects.title: Hikma
keyProjects.description: Story-reading app with reusable widgets, shimmer skeletons, and a custom green-backdrop layout system
features: Shared component library and Figma-derived theme system
Reusable API service layer with token management and robust error handling
TTS reader, chapter progress tracking, bookmarking, and dynamic text-image layout

keyProjects.title: Beauty Line Bangladesh
keyProjects.description: React application with reusable component libraries and modular API service layer
features: Reusable component libraries to improve development efficiency
Service layer for APIs (media, news, posts, counts, health)
Modular hooks for data fetching and pagination
